blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.
Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
